test.name: Scenario: As a site administrator I can add a PelikulaContainer

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Applicable driver not found; attempting to install with Selenium Manager (Beta)
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Enable Autologin As
kw.doc: Add and configure DomainAuthHelper PAS-plugin to login all anonymous users from localhost as a special *Remote User* with one or more given roles. Examples of use::

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When I type 'My PelikulaContainer' into the title field
kw.source_name: I type '${title}' into the title field

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'My PelikulaContainer' into text field 'name=form.widgets.IBasic.title'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then a PelikulaContainer with the title 'My PelikulaContainer' has been created
kw.source_name: a PelikulaContainer with the title '${title}' has been created

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
No Operation
kw.doc: Does absolutely nothing.

kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'My PelikulaContainer' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'My PelikulaContainer' but did not.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.status: Page should have contained text 'My PelikulaContainer' but did not.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.status: Page should have contained text 'My PelikulaContainer' but did not.

test.name: Scenario: As a site administrator I can view a PelikulaContainer

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Applicable driver not found; attempting to install with Selenium Manager (Beta)
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Enable Autologin As
kw.doc: Add and configure DomainAuthHelper PAS-plugin to login all anonymous users from localhost as a special *Remote User* with one or more given roles. Examples of use::

kw.name: Create Content
kw.doc: Create content and return its UID

kw.name: When I go to the PelikulaContainer view
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Then I can see the PelikulaContainer title 'My PelikulaContainer'
kw.source_name: I can see the PelikulaContainer title '${title}'

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.name: Scenario: As a member I want to be able to log into the website

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Applicable driver not found; attempting to install with Selenium Manager (Beta)
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'You are now logged in'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: Example of a BDD-style (Behavior-driven development) test.

test.name: Scenario: As a site administrator I can add a Pelikula

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Applicable driver not found; attempting to install with Selenium Manager (Beta)
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Enable Autologin As
kw.doc: Add and configure DomainAuthHelper PAS-plugin to login all anonymous users from localhost as a special *Remote User* with one or more given roles. Examples of use::

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When I type 'My Pelikula' into the title field
kw.source_name: I type '${title}' into the title field

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'My Pelikula' into text field 'name=form.widgets.IBasic.title'.

kw.name: No Operation
kw.doc: Does absolutely nothing.
Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then a Pelikula with the title 'My Pelikula' has been created
kw.source_name: a Pelikula with the title '${title}' has been created

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.name: Scenario: As a site administrator I can view a Pelikula

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Applicable driver not found; attempting to install with Selenium Manager (Beta)
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Enable Autologin As
kw.doc: Add and configure DomainAuthHelper PAS-plugin to login all anonymous users from localhost as a special *Remote User* with one or more given roles. Examples of use::

kw.name: Create Content
kw.doc: Create content and return its UID

kw.name: When I go to the Pelikula view
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Then I can see the Pelikula title 'My Pelikula'
kw.source_name: I can see the Pelikula title '${title}'

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
